purpose: Identify emotionally charged J-space lexical scores associated with GSM8K correctness, lock one word and the observed association sign on discovery data, and estimate that locked association on disjoint validation data before using the word for exploratory RL.
solved_eligibility: retired and ineligible; it is absent from the candidate inventory and cannot be selected by the descriptive atlas

data_firewall.available_gsm8k_indices: only the already-exposed failed-V4 400-item development curve
data_firewall.split_algorithm: ascending raw SHA-256 of split salt plus source index; first 200 discovery and remaining 200 validation

generation.prompt_seed: first 63 bits of SHA-256(seed salt plus source index)

j_readout.standardization: candidate-specific pinned WikiText mean and population standard deviation, clipped to [-5, 5]

selection.statistic: prompt-centered point-biserial correlation over mixed-correctness rollout groups
selection.rule: largest absolute discovery correlation among eligible emotional candidates; exact numerical tie goes to lexicographically smallest canonical word
selection.reward_sign: positive weight for positive discovery correlation and negative weight for negative discovery correlation
selection.multiplicity_adjustment: within-prompt max absolute statistic over all eligible frozen candidates

validation.stable_association: signed validation correlation is positive, one-sided permutation p <= 0.05, and the 95% cluster-bootstrap interval is wholly in the locked direction
validation.association_pass: stable association and discovery max-|r| adjusted p <= 0.05
validation.reason_not_rl_gate: the user requested this as a separate mechanistic experiment; exploratory RL may test the locked emotional target regardless, while all inferential results remain reported

inference_boundary: This experiment measures association, not a causal RL improvement. Any RL curve from a selected word is adaptive development evidence; significant improvement still requires a separately frozen emotional-only confirmation on untouched data.
